CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "PBR - REAGENTS PROTEIN BIOLOGY") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "PBR - REAGENTS PROTEIN BIOLOGY") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "PBR - REAGENTS PROTEIN BIOLOGY"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "Protein Biology Reagents - PBR"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "PBR"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "29-PBR")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-PBR
